_note: Reference ~/.claude/settings.json for github.com/kinggunil/claude-code-addons. Keys starting with '_' are annotations only — Claude Code ignores unknown keys, so you can leave or delete them when copying.
_A_addon: ===== (A) claude-code-addons — the installer (install.sh / install.ps1) merges THESE into your real settings.json automatically; you don't add them by hand =====
_A_paths: Paths below use the macOS/Linux form: $HOME/.claude + no file extension. On Windows the installer writes an absolute path with .exe instead, e.g. C:\Users\you\.claude\statusline-rs.exe and claude-notify.exe.
_B_personal: ===== (B) the author's personal Claude Code preferences — the installer NEVER touches these; copy only the ones you want =====
_B_warning: bypassPermissions + skipDangerousModePermissionPrompt DISABLE Claude Code's permission prompts machine-wide. Understand that trade-off before copying them.
